summary: Excellent 5.1 surround mix captures a firing Philly performance with very few dull moments.
review: Kevin’s surround‑sound matrix mix sounds crystal‑clear on a 5.1 system, delivering an immersive listening experience. The band was “firing on all cylinders” in Philadelphia, providing many highlights and almost no dead spots throughout the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the high‑quality surround mix; strong positive sentiment but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Surround (5.1) mix described as sounding really good, crisp and immersive on a multichannel system.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally strong set with many highlights and very few dull moments; the band maintained high energy throughout.
